binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
Prebuilt binaries for Advanced ligolo-ng
Ligolo-ng is a simple, lightweight and fast tool that allows pentesters to
establish tunnels from a reverse TCP/TLS connection using a tun interface
(without the need of SOCKS).

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ligolo-ng-common-binaries because ### ligolo-ng-common-binaries.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ligolo-ng-common-binaries with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ligolo-ng-common-binaries --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### ligolo-ng-common-binaries.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install ligolo-ng-common-binaries
Install with: sudo apt install ligolo-ng-common-binaries
